hero.headline: Hands-on Ultrasound Training for the Real Bedside.
hero.subheadline: Internationally accepted Point-of-Care Ultrasound education that empowers physicians to apply ultrasound confidently and accurately in their daily clinical practice.

about.headline: A modern, practical approach to bedside ultrasound.
about.body: We deliver Point-of-Care Ultrasound education in a modern, practical, and impactful way — creating a measurable difference in patient care and taking ultrasound education beyond today's limits.

feature.title: Clinically precise
feature.desc: Faculty-vetted modules built around real bedside scenarios.

feature.title: Confidence-building
feature.desc: Repeat until mastered drills before you scan a patient.

feature.title: Approachable
feature.desc: Plain-language teaching from physicians, for physicians.

track.label: Advanced POCUS
track.desc: Haemodynamic assessment in the unstable patient

track.label: Simulation POCUS
track.desc: Image-guided regional anaesthesia from forearm to axilla

track.label: Regional Anaesthesia US
track.desc: Adapted protocols for neonates and children

track.label: Musculoskeletal US
track.desc: Train the trainer: facilitation and feedback skills

track.label: Thoracic Ultrasound
track.desc: Adapted protocols for neonates and children

track.label: Sonoschool Instructor
track.desc: Train the trainer: facilitation and feedback skills

whyUs.headline: Built by clinicians, for clinicians.
whyUs.body: Most ultrasound courses teach you to read images. We teach you to use ultrasound as a clinical tool — the way it's actually used at the bedside.
whyUs.pillarsHeading: Four things that set us apart

pillar.title: Clinically precise
pillar.desc: Every module is faculty-vetted and built around real bedside scenarios, not theory for its own sake. You practice the exact workflow you'll use on shift.

pillar.title: Authoritative curriculum
pillar.desc: Fully aligned with EFSUMB & WINFOCUS international standards — meaning your certificate is recognised globally, not just locally.

pillar.title: Confidence-building drills
pillar.desc: Repeat-until-mastered simulation drills mean you've already scanned the scenario dozens of times before you face it on a real patient.

pillar.title: Physician-to-physician
pillar.desc: Plain-language teaching from clinicians who still scan patients daily. No academic detachment — pure bedside knowledge transfer.

verify.headline: Verify a certificate
verify.body: Enter a certificate ID to confirm its authenticity and view the holder's details.

footerCta.headline: Ready to scan with confidence?
footerCta.body: Join thousands of clinicians who've made POCUS part of their everyday practice.
